query: mixed color temperature sodium vapor orange streetlight clashing fluorescent night urban
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: mixed color temp — sodium vapor orange vs blue twilight, clashing artificial light sources, desolate urban night

response.objective_caption: A paved pathway at night extending into the distance, lined with trees and grass on the left and a tall wire mesh fence on the right. Overhead streetlights shine through the branches, creating elongated shadows across the concrete surface, while a dark evening sky is visible above the tree line.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A paved pathway at night extending into the distance, lined with trees and grass on the left and a tall wire mesh fence on the right. The scene is dominated by an oppressive orange-yellow sodium vapor cast that shifts all surfaces toward a sickly monochrome hue, as streetlights shine through the branches and create elongated shadows across the concrete beneath a dark evening sky.
